title: address_part/bare_address always returns owned String
description: message::address_part and bare_address return String even for the AddressPart::All case, which could return &str borrowed from the input. In eval_address_test and eval_envelope_test these are called inside the inner header-matching loop. Changing the return type to Cow<str> would avoid the allocation for the common :all case and the addr.to_string() fallback in bare_address — expected impact: one String allocation eliminated per matched header field in :address/:envelope tests.
